infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Chefsbook uses your camera to scan recipes from cookbooks, handwritten cards, and printed pages.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Chefsbook accesses your photo library so you can import recipe images.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Chefsbook saves recipe photos to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Chefsbook uses your microphone for voice search.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Chefsbook uses speech recognition for hands-free recipe search.

plugins.cameraPermission: Chefsbook uses your camera to scan recipes.

plugins.photosPermission: Chefsbook accesses photos to import recipe images.
